seoTitle: Boallia vs Bobalong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Boallia and Bobalong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Boallia and Bobalong.
heading: Boallia vs Bobalong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boallia, Western Australia and Bobalong, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boallia has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Bobalong (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boallia or Bobalong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boallia has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Bobalong scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boallia scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Bobalong scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boallia or Bobalong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boallia has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
